title: StardewCraft
body:
# StardewCraft

## A minecraft mod to bring the valley experience to the cubic game

> ### Crops 
> ![A little field with crops of parsnips and blue jazz ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9089f141401ab644d95bca308984c573761666b0.jpeg)
> Plant your favorite Stardew valley crops and make delicious dishes with them! (Currently available parsnips and blue jazz).
> ### Stardrop
> This unique item will enhance your strength by permanently adding an extra heart once consumed.

> ### Scarecrows
> Deploy these fellows to shield your crops from pesky crows. Don’t miss out on the exclusive designs—gotta catch'em all!

> ### New Blocks
> Get ready to utilize innovative blocks such as the seeding machine, crystalarium, and many others.

> ### New Tools
> Fed up with accumulating excess copper? Explore the new copper tools, a mid-tier option between stone and iron. Keep an eye out for the upcoming iridium tier, which will be accessible through special events involving meteorite falls in the overworld. In addition to the standard tools, we’re introducing enhancements for the fishing rod to add a twist to your fishing adventures.

> ### And More!
> The mod is still in its infancy, but we’re excited to expand the gameplay with additional mechanics, items, and even creatures as we progress.

> #### Stay connected and savor the wonders of the valley!
